summary: Joel Spolsky briefly announces that he has published a description of Fog Creek Software's compensation system for Inc. magazine. He also shares the Fog Creek professional ladder, which determines employee levels and base salaries. The post itself is essentially a pointer to two external resources rather than a substantive essay.
key_points: Fog Creek uses a structured professional ladder to determine employee levels
Base salary is computed from an employee's level on the professional ladder
Spolsky believes in transparency around compensation systems, publishing details publicly
money_quotes: I also posted the Fog Creek professional ladder which is used to compute everyone's level and thus determines their base salary.
key_insight: Fog Creek uses a transparent, level-based professional ladder to systematically determine employee compensation.
